post.summary:
Ask mode: research and answer questions without executing write operations.
Accepts `application/json`. Attach documents via Simplic.OxS.AI.Agent.Models.AgentDocument
with base64-encoded bytes in the `content` field.

Agent mode: execute tool-based actions with approval workflows.
Accepts `application/json`. Attach documents via Simplic.OxS.AI.Agent.Models.AgentDocument
with base64-encoded bytes in the `content` field.

Create an execution plan without executing it.
Accepts `application/json`. Attach documents via Simplic.OxS.AI.Agent.Models.AgentDocument
with base64-encoded bytes in the `content` field.

Stream agent execution events using Server-Sent Events.
Accepts `application/json`. Attach documents via Simplic.OxS.AI.Agent.Models.AgentDocument
with base64-encoded bytes in the `content` field.

get.summary: Gets all messages for a session.

post.summary: Approves or rejects a pending action in a session.
Answers a clarification question from the agent.

get.summary: Gets pending approvals for a session.

post.summary:
Start a conversation with Server-Sent Events streaming.
Streams reasoning and content tokens as they arrive from the LLM.
Event types: "reasoning" (thinking tokens) and "content" (response tokens).
Final event is "done" with the complete conversation as JSON data.

Reply to a conversation with Server-Sent Events streaming.
Streams reasoning and content tokens as they arrive from the LLM.
Event types: "reasoning" (thinking tokens) and "content" (response tokens).
Final event is "done" with the complete message as JSON data.

get.summary: Gets all configured MCP servers for the current organization.

post.summary: Adds a new MCP server configuration for the current organization.
Imports tools from all configured MCP servers for the current organization.

get.summary: Checks health of all configured MCP servers for the current organization.

post.summary: Registers a tool from a remote microservice.

get.summary: Checks the health of a specific tool.

role.description: Gets or sets the message role (user, assistant, system, tool).

content.description: Gets or sets the message content.

timestamp.description: Gets or sets the timestamp of the message.

toolName.description: Gets or sets the tool name, if this is a tool message.

AgentMessageResponse.description: DTO representing a single message in an agent session, returned by the API.

id.description: Gets or sets the session identifier.

userId.description: Gets or sets the user identifier.

organizationId.description: Gets or sets the organization identifier.

createdAt.description: Gets or sets the session creation time.

lastActivityAt.description: Gets or sets the last activity time.

isActive.description: Gets or sets whether the session is active.

messageCount.description: Gets or sets the message count.

pendingApprovalCount.description: Gets or sets pending approval count.

AgentSessionResponse.description: DTO representing an agent session returned by the API.

answer.description: Gets or sets the answer text.

AnswerRequest.description: Request to answer a clarification question.

approvalId.description: Gets or sets the approval request identifier.

decision.description: Gets or sets the decision (Approve, Reject, ModifyPlan).

ApprovalDecisionRequest.description: Request to record an approval decision.

id.description: Gets or sets the approval request identifier.

message.description: Gets or sets the message describing what is being approved.

planId.description: Gets or sets the plan identifier.

stepId.description: Gets or sets the step identifier requiring approval.

toolName.description: Gets or sets the tool name requiring approval.

riskLevel.description: Gets or sets the risk level of the action.

options.description: Gets or sets the available approval options.

createdAt.description: Gets or sets when the approval was created.

ApprovalRequestDto.description: DTO representing a pending approval request returned by the API.

modelId.description: Gets or sets the id of the model, which will be used.

text.description: Gets or sets the text to classify

ClassifyTextAsyncRequest.description: Represents an request to classify a text async.

jobId.description:
Gets or sets the job id.
Its the id to check the aws query.

state.description:
Gets or sets the state of the job.
e.g. processing, complete or failed.

stateText.description: Gets or sets a state text with more informations about the state.

results.description: Gets or sets a list of the results.

ClassifyTextAsyncResponse.description: Represents an response of a text classification action.

predictedLabel.description: Gets or sets the predicted label.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the context

id.description: Gets or sets the id of the referenced context.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the context system

contextMessage.description:
Gets or sets a message, that represents a manual context.
If this is set, togehter with Name and Id, both will be passed to the AI

id.description: Gets or sets the conversation id

userId.description: Gets or sets the user the llm conversation is attached to

model.description: Gets or sets the LLM model, e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4

messages.description: Gets or sets the messages inside the conversation

createDateTime.description: Gets or sets the creation date time

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the model base.

type.description:
Gets or sets the type of the model base.
as example. aws-comprehend-multi-classification

state.description:
Gets or sets the state of the base model.
new, training, completed and failed.s

trainingFormatData.description:
Gets or sets the format of the training data.
e.g. csv.

delimiter.description: Gets or sets the delimiter for the data.

labelDelimiter.description: Gets or sets the delimiter for the labels.

CreateTextClassificationModelRequest.description: Represents an request to create a new model to text classification.

content.description: Gets or sets the document content

dataType.description: Gets or sets the data type

addToSearchIndex.description: Gets or sets whether to add the embedding to a search index

disable.description: Gets or sets whether disabling the embedding model

dataType.description: Gets or sets the data type (null/empty string will search everywhere)

count.description: Gets or sets the used documents (count)

contentType.description: Gets or sets the MIME content type (e.g. image/png, application/pdf)

data.description: Gets or sets the blob data. Serialized as base64 in JSON.

fileName.description: Gets or sets an optional file name

MessageBlobModel.description: Represents a binary blob attached to a message

id.description: Gets or sets the message id

senderId.description: Gets or sets the sender. Ox user id, null for llm model

dateTime.description: Gets or sets the datetime the message was created

body.description: Gets or sets the message body

modelReference.description: Gets or sets an optional model reference for the message

blobs.description: Gets or sets binary blobs attached to this message

reasoning.description: Gets or sets reasoning/thinking content from the LLM (if supported)

conversationId.description: Gets or sets the conversation id

message.description: Gets or sets the initial message

blobs.description: Gets or sets optional binary blobs (e.g. images) to attach to the message

ReplyToConversationRequest.description: Model for interacting with a conversation

model.description: Gets or sets the LLM model, e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4

message.description: Gets or sets the initial message

blobs.description: Gets or sets optional binary blobs (e.g. images) to attach to the message

state.description: Gets or sets the status value

id.description: Gets or sets the id of the text classification model.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the model base.

type.description:
Gets or sets the type of the model base.
as example. aws-comprehend-multi-classification

state.description:
Gets or sets the state of the base model.
new, training, completed and failed.s

stateText.description:
Gets or sets the current state text.
Its a text with more information about the state.

trainingFormatData.description:
Gets or sets the format of the training data.
e.g. csv.

delimiter.description: Gets or sets the delimiter for the data.

labelDelimiter.description: Gets or sets the delimiter for the labels.

trainingDataPath.description:
Gets or sets the actually trainings data.
Its a path to a csv file in a aws bucket.

version.description: Gets or sets the current model version

label.description: Gets or sets the matched label.

confidence.description: Gets or sets the confidence, how good the label matches the text.

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 

 Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.

Example: "Bearer 12345abcdef"
